Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the men's room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can feel my mind starting to[n]wander as I wash my hands...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Someone is trapped inside Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I need to hurry and rescue them soon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Junpei asked if we could meet today...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should go see him later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sanada asked if we could meet today...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should go see him later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Amada asked if we could meet today...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should go see him later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aragaki asked if we could meet today...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should go see him later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, Koromaru's[n]usually sitting outside the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should go see him later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The girl at the park wanted to[n]eat something round and hot.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should go buy it later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The girl at the park wanted[n]something to drink...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should look for a drink that's[n]"fizzy, mad, and bitter" later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the guy at the[n]shrine was looking for a fountain pen...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I could find it for him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I found the fountain pen that guy[n]at the shrine was looking for...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should return it to him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Gourmet King asked me to bring him[n]something he's never eaten before...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I listen to his request?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have to harvest the crops I[n]planted in the rooftop planters...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't think there's anything in particular[n]that needs my attention right now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Oh, right... I gave some money to that[n]one guy in a suit at Paulownia Mall.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder what happened to that money...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It can be harvested starting {f 0 1 2}{f 2 4 1}/{f 2 4 2}{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru asked if we could meet today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, Mitsuru asked me to[n]deliver the school reinstatement form...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I still haven't gotten used to fighting yet...[n]Maybe we should go to Tartarus tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder if our teamwork has improved...[n]Maybe we should go to Tartarus tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder if I'm making good use of Theurgy...[n]Maybe we should go to Tartarus tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder if I've been using Personas well...[n]Maybe we should go to Tartarus tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since our team's grown, I need[n]to figure out the party lineup.[n]Maybe we should go to Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The enemies have been growing stronger.[n]Maybe we should go to Tartarus tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The next large Shadow will be the last.[n]Maybe we should go to Tartarus tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Dark Hour still exists... Maybe[n]we should go to Tartarus tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder if I'm ready for battle... Maybe[n]we should head to Tartarus tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have today off... What[n]should I do after this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's almost summer break...[n]What should I do with my time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's almost time for first[n]semester midterms... I should[n]study while I still have time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's almost time for first[n]semester finals... I should[n]study while I still have time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's almost time for second[n]semester midterms... I should[n]study while I still have time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's almost time for second[n]semester finals... I should[n]study while I still have time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's about time for a full moon. I wonder[n]if another large Shadow will appear...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's about time for a full moon. I wonder[n]if we'll deal with another hardship...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's about time for a full moon. I wonder[n]what kind of enemy we'll face next...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's about time for a full moon.[n]Only a few enemies left now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's about time for a full moon.[n]Then it'll finally be over...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We're going to Yakushima soon. I wonder[n]what this trip will have in store for us...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The school trip is coming up soon.[n]What should I check out in Kyoto?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}New Year's Eve is fast approaching.[n]It's time to make a decision...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The {f 0 1 2}Promised Day{f 0 1 27} is imminent. I should do[n]what I can now so that I have no regrets...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Now that I'm a member of Umiushi's[n]loyalty program, I can order takeout.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should give it a try sometime...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's possible to buy drinks from a[n]certain vending machine at Iwatodai[n]Station even if it says it's sold out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should try to buy something next time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Seems like the track team is[n]recruiting new members...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should go check it out sometime.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The used bookstore at the[n]Iwatodai strip mall has reopened.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder what kind of books they have...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The shopping program airs on Sundays.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should use the TV in my room to watch it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's an elementary school student[n]playing alone at Naganaki Shrine...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder if something's troubling her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There seems to be an[n]opening in the art club...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should go check it out sometime...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's going to be a film festival at[n]Screen Shot movie theater soon.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should invite[n]someone to come with me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The culture festival is coming up soon,[n]but the typhoon is approaching...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}At this rate, I wonder if the[n]festival will get canceled...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like Screen Shot is holding a one-day[n]film festival on September 23rd...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should invite[n]someone to come with me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Career experience starts November 24th...[n]I wonder what I'll be doing that week.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Oh yeah... I left a taiyaki in the fridge.[n]I should probably eat that soon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Whenever I see cherry blossoms in full bloom,[n]it feels like springtime has finally arrived.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We can explore Tartarus[n]properly starting today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This is the season when bugs start[n]to crawl out of the woodwork...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's been getting hotter and more humid[n]lately. Summer must be approaching...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's so hot, I'm sweating like crazy[n]even while sitting on the toilet...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_062_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's already September, but the[n]summer heat is still lingering...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_063_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The weather's gotten cooler and[n]more comfortable during the day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_064_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder if the leaves will change[n]colors soon since it's finally autumn.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_065_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's gotten much colder lately.[n]Winter is finally coming...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_066_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tomorrow is Christmas Eve...[n]How should I spend it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_067_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's Christmas...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder if everyone around the[n]world is having a good time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_068_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel more energetic at the[n]beginning of a new year.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_069_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's gotten chilly lately. I just want to[n]stay underneath a kotatsu all day...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_070_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel so exhausted...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can't keep my eyes open...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_071_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I only went to school today, but my[n]whole body feels heavy and sluggish...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can't keep my eyes open...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The third-years' graduation[n]ceremony is tomorrow.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should head to bed early tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_072_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Oh yeah... I have what the[n]little girl at the park asked for.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should go see her later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_073_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hayase invited me to join him for a meal.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should head to the strip mall later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_074_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have the chills. Maybe I[n]caught a cold or something...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_075_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the Promised Day... Once the Dark[n]Hour arrives, there's no turning back.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should do what needs to be[n]done now while I still have time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_076_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Oh, right... Aragaki asked me to submit[n]his leave of absence extension form.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_077_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, I was asked to[n]sort Aragaki's belongings in his room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_078_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, I should[n]check how Amada's doing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_079_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a {f 0 1 2}persimmon tree{f 0 1 27}[n]somewhere at Gekkoukan High.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should look for it later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_080_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}[n]I picked up at the walkway.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should show the old[n]couple at the bookstore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_081_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru should be outside the[n]dorm entrance at this time of day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go see him later...[n]{f 1 1}
